# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Key Vault"
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the Key Vault"
      }
    },
    "tenantId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[subscription().tenantId]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Azure AD tenant ID"
      }
    },
    "appServicePrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the primary application service principal"
      }
    },
    "devTeamServicePrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the dev team service principal"
      }
    },
    "ciCdServicePrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the CI/CD pipeline service principal"
      }
    },
    "monitoringServicePrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the monitoring service principal"
      }
    },
    "enableSoftDelete": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "softDeleteRetentionInDays": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 90
    },
    "enablePurgeProtection": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "standard",
      "allowedValues": [
        "standard",
        "premium"
      ]
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
        "sku": {
          "family": "A",
          "name": "[parameters('skuName')]"
        },
        "enableSoftDelete": "[parameters('enableSoftDelete')]",
        "softDeleteRetentionInDays": "[parameters('softDeleteRetentionInDays')]",
        "enablePurgeProtection": "[parameters('enablePurgeProtection')]",
        "enableRbacAuthorization": false,
        "networkAcls": {
          "defaultAction": "Deny",
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "ipRules": [],
          "virtualNetworkRules": []
        },
        "accessPolicies": [
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('appServicePrincipalId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ],
              "keys": [],
              "certificates": []
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('devTeamServicePrincipalId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ],
              "keys": [],
              "certificates": []
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('ciCdServicePrincipalId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list",
                "set"
              ],
              "keys": [],
              "certificates": []
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('monitoringServicePrincipalId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list"
              ],
              "keys": [],
              "certificates": []
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/providers/diagnosticSettings",
      "apiVersion": "2021-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('keyVaultName'), '/Microsoft.Insights/', 'auditLogs')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "logs": [
          {
            "category": "AuditEvent",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          }
        ],
        "metrics": [
          {
            "category": "AllMetrics",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "keyVaultId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    },
    "keyVaultUri": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))).vaultUri]"
    },
    "securityNotes": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "IMPORTANT: This vault uses explicit per-principal access policies with least-privilege permissions. Each service principal is granted only get/list on secrets (CI/CD additionally has set). Network access is restricted to Azure services only. Audit logging is enabled. Before production: 1) Add specific IP rules or VNet rules to networkAcls, 2) Review each access policy to confirm necessity, 3) Consider migrating to RBAC authorization (enableRbacAuthorization=true) for finer-grained control, 4) Ensure diagnostic logs are routed to a Log Analytics workspace or storage account."
    }
  }
}
